article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.4. Attachment 1 - Draft Burnaby Loan Authorization (BHA Newcombe Project Loan Guarantee) Bylaw 2026 2026.01.27.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby to Guarantee $100M Loan for Newcombe Housing Development
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a proposed bylaw that would allow the City of Burnaby to guarantee a $100-million loan for the Burnaby Housing Authority (BHA) to build housing at 10th and Newcombe. A loan guarantee means the City would be on the hook to repay the loan if the BHA cannot.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council vote — this large public housing project may affect local construction and property markets.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Finance & Insurance
